executive_summary: Build workflow dispatch failed due to missing GitHub Actions workflow file. The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository, preventing any build execution. This is a critical configuration error that must be resolved before any Maven builds can be attempted.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found error. The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository loginkarun/scib_demo on branch main.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The required GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) is missing from the repository. This file is necessary to define the CI/CD pipeline for building the Maven project.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created. This blocks all CI/CD automation, testing, and deployment processes.

errors.title: Workflow Dispatch Endpoint Inaccessible
errors.description: The GitHub Actions API endpoint for workflow dispatch is returning 404, indicating either missing permissions, disabled Actions, or incorrect workflow path.
errors.root_cause: Either the workflow file doesn't exist at the specified path, GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository, or the authentication token lacks necessary workflow/actions permissions.
errors.impact: Unable to trigger automated builds programmatically. Manual intervention required to create workflow file and verify repository settings.

recommended_actions.description: Create .github/workflows/build.yml file in the repository with proper Maven build configuration
Ensure GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings
Confirm authentication token has workflow and actions permissions

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Build failure classified as CONFIGURATION_ERROR due to missing workflow file. No Maven build was executed. Error occurred during workflow dispatch phase.
